channel.title: Global Sanctions News (Custom RSS)
channel.description: Auto-generated feed from rendered Global Sanctions news list

item.title: EU adds 15 people and 1 entity to human rights sanctions list
item.description: The EU has designated 15 people and 1 entity under its Regulation (EU) 2020/1998 human rights sanctions list – press release. See our EU human rights pages for information on the Reg 2020/1998 list, i

item.title: US lists Cuban Ministry of Tourism and 9 other entities
item.description: The US has listed 10 entities under its EO 14404 Cuba sanctions regime for carrying out, enabling and financing the violent repression of people in Cuba – press release. The designations include Cu

item.title: US adds 3 to cyber sanctions list
item.description: The US has added 2 people and 1 entity to its EO 13694 cyber sanctions list – press release. VPN network 1VPNS has been designated for selling VPN services to ransomware actors and other cybercri

item.title: EU introduces sanctions on Sudan’s gold sector
item.description: The EU has expanded the scope of its Regulation (EU) 2023/2147 Sudan sanctions regime by introducing sectoral sanctions on gold originating in Sudan – press release. Regulation (EU) 2026/1724 amend

item.title: Switzerland updates Iran money transfer notification and authorisation forms
item.description: Switzerland has updated the notification and authorisation forms for money transfers under Article 21 of the Ordinance on Measures against the Islamic Republic of Iran. From August 2026, SECO will acc

item.title: US issues DRC general licence for agricultural commodities, medicine and medical devices
item.description: The US has issued DRC-related General License 2. The GL authorises all transactions that are ordinarily incident and necessary to: The export or reexport of agricultural commodities, medicine, me

item.title: UK adds Islamic Movement of Companions of the Right to Iran sanctions list
item.description: The UK has added the Islamic Movement of Companions of the Right to the UK Iran sanctions list under the Iran (Sanctions) Regulations 2023 – press release; written statement. The IMCR claimed responsi

item.title: UK extends Russia & Belarus brokerage general licence for 1 year until 2027
item.description: The UK has extended General Licence (GL) INT/2025/6641980 for one year, until 16 July 2027. The licence allows non-designated persons who have made investments through a sanctioned broker to transfer

item.title: US eases UAE export controls
item.description: The US Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) has published a final rule giving the United Arab Emirates enhanced favourable treatment under the Export Administration Regulations (EAR). BIS said the ch

item.title: US adds 8 people and 6 entities linked to Iranian financing networks to Iran sanctions lists
item.description: The US has added 8 people and 6 entities active in the Iranian finance sectors to its EO 13876 and EO 13902 Iran sanctions lists – press release. Ali Ansari and Smart Global Ltd, a company linked
